title: GSoC Mentor
summary: Mentoring a Google Summer of Code contributor within the JSON Schema ecosystem. Responsibilities include reviewing code contributions, providing technical feedback, recommending best practices for code quality and maintainability, supporting project planning and execution, and helping the contributor navigate both the program and open-source collaboration effectively.

title: Triage Member
summary: Collaborated with the global developers and organization members to contribute to the codebase, review pull requests & issues, and helps maintain the repository with a focus on production-scale reliability and continuous learning.

title: Open Source Contributor
summary: Visualizing JSON Schema as an interactive graphical struture to make complex schemas easier to understand for developers. Built as an open-source tool during the GSoC, focusing on clarity, usability, and real-world schema support.

title: Artificial Intelligence Intern
summary: Collaborated with the global developers and organization members to contribute to the codebase, review pull requests & issues, and helps maintain the repository with a focus on production-scale reliability and continuous learning.

title: Full Stack Developer
summary: Completed a virtual internship, receiving mentorship and training from industry experts while contributing to a real world project under the team guidance.
